answer: The Druid cantrip list in D&D 2024 includes: Guidance (assistance), Poison Spray (bouffee-de-poison), Shillelagh (crosse-des-druides), Druidcraft (druidisme), Thorn Whip (fouet-epineux), Starry Wisp (lumiere-stellaire), Produce Flame (production-de-flamme), Mending (raccommodage), and Resistance (resistance). Note: this list is from training knowledge as the catalog is not accessible in this condition.
